# Hanover Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: hanover-hollywood-6200-w-sunset-blvd
- Address: 6200 W Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90028
- Primary URL: https://www.hanoverhollywood.com/
- Management company: Hanover Company
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 3)
- Community stability: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site continues to market a brand-new luxury community steps from Hollywood & Vine. Source: Hanover Hollywood official site (https://www.hanoverhollywood.com/). Note: Official copy describes a brand-new luxury community on Sunset Boulevard near Hollywood & Vine.
- [review] Apartments.com currently lists package service, controlled access, video patrol, study lounge, pool, and rooftop skydecks. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/hanover-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/9zcp565/). Note: Current listing shows package service, controlled access, video patrol, study lounge, pool, and rooftop skydecks.
- [review] ApartmentHomeLiving continues to show active pricing and current inventory. Source: ApartmentHomeLiving.com (https://www.apartmenthomeliving.com/apartment-finder/Hanover-Hollywood-Los-Angeles-CA-90028-6188561). Note: Public profile showed current pricing and availability.

## Open questions
- Resolve pet-policy conflict in writing and confirm any package-room or concierge setup.

## Notes
Tour candidate. Hanover looks unusually strong on workspace and building operations, with the main issues being Sunset exposure and the need to pin down pet-policy details and package handling in writing.
